events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. 

Summary: a missing supplemental electrode is a **fail** — NEC 250.53(A)(2) requires a single rod/pipe/plate electrode to be supplemented by a second electrode unless a documented resistance-to-ground test shows 25 ohms or less. With no supplemental electrode and no test documentation, the grounding electrode system doesn't meet Article 250 Part III minimums, posing a life-safety risk (inadequate ground-fault/surge dissipation path). Corrective action: install a supplemental electrode bonded to the existing one (or document a qualifying ≤25Ω test), then re-inspect before concealment.
